description_long: This object is a plush stuffed toy with a rounded, segmented body and two prominent, curved antennae on its head. The toy features large, rounded arms and legs, giving it a soft and huggable appearance. Its silhouette suggests a whimsical, cartoonish creature, possibly inspired by an insect or fantasy animal, with exaggerated proportions and a playful design. The surface appears uniformly colored and plush, with no visible clothing or accessories. The toy's limbs are slightly splayed, and its head is proportionally large compared to its body. There are no visible facial features or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A plush, cartoonish stuffed toy with a rounded body, large limbs, and two curved antennae, all in a single solid color.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's symmetrical body, large arms, legs, and two curved antennae on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the body and the forward curve of the antennae, with one arm and leg visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and limbs, with antennae visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other side's arm, leg, and the curve of the antennae.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features are visible; the face is featureless and expressionless.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms and legs slightly splayed outward, and antennae raised above the head.
